title: CoNLL-2003 NER with Triage
description: Named entity recognition with a triage pre-annotation step, based on the CoNLL-2003 Shared Task (Tjong Kim Sang & De Meulder, CoNLL 2003). Annotators first flag whether a sentence contains entities worth annotating, then mark spans for Person, Organization, Location, and Miscellaneous entities.
paperReference: Tjong Kim Sang & De Meulder, CoNLL 2003
citation:

    title = "Introduction to the {C}o{NLL}-2003 Shared Task: Language-Independent Named Entity Recognition",
    author = "Tjong Kim Sang, Erik F. and De Meulder, Fien",
    booktitle = "Proceedings of the Seventh Conference on Natural Language Learning at {HLT}-{NAACL} 2003",
    year = "2003",
    url = "https://aclanthology.org/W03-0419",
    pages = "142--147"
}
